text: I feel as though I am on the threshold between familiar order and creative possibility. Outside the glass doors, the world is sterile and ordinary, but inside, vibrant colors and bold letters announce innovation and discovery. The transition seems to invite not just physical movement but a shift in mentality—from routine safety to the risk and excitement of new ideas. I sense anticipation, curiosity, and a bit of humility as I step into a space where knowledge is assembled and boundaries are tested.
